title: Care Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Care Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
